remindersAreNotFinished.content: At this present hour, all thou seest is but a phantom of the eye! Thou mayest perchance save thy reminders anon, but mark well that they be not yet bound to any herald or messenger! If thou dwellest within the realm of Android, thou mayest already fashion certain things that shall bear fruit when the hidden works be complete; yet pray, remember that this shall avail thee naught upon the Web, so let not thy heart be over-filled with joy at using reminders upon thy computing engine. Furthermore, if thou be a master of the craft, we pray thee, lend us thy hand!

eventBased.title: The stirring event
eventBased.addedToFront: When a soul hath been brought to the fore
eventBased.removedFromFront: When a soul hath been taken from the fore

dayOfMonth.title: The day of the moon's cycle
dayOfMonth.desc_ordinal_one: Repeat upon the {{count}}st day of the month
dayOfMonth.desc_ordinal_two: Repeat upon the {{count}}nd day of the month
dayOfMonth.desc_ordinal_few: Repeat upon the {{count}}rd day of the month
dayOfMonth.desc_ordinal_other: Repeat upon the {{count}}th day of the month

delete.title: Banish the reminder
delete.confirm: Art thou certain thou wouldst strike this reminder from existence?
